pillars.name: Family
pillars.summary: The anchor — kids, partner, parents, siblings. Quality time with kids is often what I plan around. Remember traditions and milestones.

pillars.name: Relationships
pillars.summary: Friends, coworkers, business contacts, community. Not all relationships carry equal weight. Capture meaningful details, check in, follow up, celebrate milestones.

pillars.name: Health
pillars.summary: Lightweight capture of health notes, appointments, observations. Not a fitness or medical tracker.

pillars.name: Ambitions & Goals
pillars.summary: Personal and professional goals. Career targets, skills, milestones. Worth pursuing for their own sake — but not at the cost of family.

goals.title: Life 2.0
goals.description: Building the next chapter — Lawn Engine is the main driver right now

goals.title: Day Job
goals.description: Doctorlogic — deliver well, maintain relationships, but don't let it crowd out the bigger goal

goals.title: Side Projects
goals.description: Unabated, Declassified Records, Carfluent — keep momentum on the things I'm building and advising on

goals.title: Health
goals.description: Stay on top of checkups, fitness, and energy — can't build anything if I'm running on empty

goals.title: Family
goals.description: Be present, remember what matters, keep the house running
